+---------------------------------------------+                      +-------------------------------------------------------+
|                                 Data Layer  |                      |                                        Service Layer  |
|                                             |                      |                                                       |
| /------------\                              |                      |  +-----------------+                                  |
o++  Order DB  |<-----------------------------o--+-------------------o+-+  Order Service  |<------+                          |
o+\------------/                              |  +--------------------+ +-----------------+       |      +----------------+  |     +---------------+
o+--------------------------------------------o--|  Response Builder  |<+                         +------+  User Service  |<-o-----+  API Gateway  |
o+                            /-----------\   |  +--------------------+                           |      +----------------+  |     +---------------+
o+----------------------------+  User DB  |<--o--+-------------------o+---------------------------+                          |
|                             \-----------/   |                      |                                                       |
|                                             |                      |                                                       |
|                                             |                      |                                                       |
+---------------------------------------------+                      +-------------------------------------------------------+
